text: {"overallConclusion":"","inferences":[{"type":"supports","premiseIndexes":[0,1],"conclusionIndex":2,"warrant":"When multiple independent studies report the same association, the cumulative evidence increases confidence that the effect is real.","strength":"moderate","defeaters":["If the studies share the same data source and authors, they may not be truly independent","If either study has methodological flaws or biases that could explain the association","If there are unaccounted confounding variables affecting LDL levels"]}]}
